message: [typescript-best-practices] Never use 'any' → Use 'unknown' with type guards or a proper type
[drizzle-best-practices] Use TRPCError instead of generic Error in routers
[nextjs-app-router-patterns] Don't fetch in useEffect → Use Server Components or React Query
[typescript-best-practices] fetch .json() returns any → Validate with Zod schema
[next-best-practices] Use useSearchParams() hook instead of window.location.search → Import and use useSearchParams() hook from next/navigation instead of manually parsing window.location.search
[next-best-practices] Avoid client-side data filtering when server-side filtering is possible → Move filtering logic to server component or use tRPC query parameters for server-side filtering

[drizzle-best-practices] Use proper timestamp type instead of text for date/time columns → Change text('last_contacted_at') to timestamp('last_contacted_at') or timestamp('last_contacted_at').withDefault(sql`now()`) for PostgreSQL
